extract: False Swipe (Japanese: みねうち Strike with the Back of the Sword) is a damage-dealing Normal-type move introduced in Generation II. It is: TM54 from Generation IV to Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, and in Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl. TM94 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM057 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM122 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
